name: Investors
description: Investor reporting, board updates, cap-table hygiene and funding-round milestones.

items.title: Monthly investor update
items.description: Share KPIs, revenue, burn, runway, wins and asks with existing investors.
items.notes: Standard template — metrics, highlights, lowlights, asks, cash position.

items.title: Quarterly board deck
items.description: Consolidated financials, product roadmap, hiring plan and material risks.

items.title: Cap table reconciliation
items.description: Reconcile cap table with ROC records and ESOP grants issued.

items.title: Share audited financials
items.description: Share audited financial statements and auditor's report with investors.

items.title: SHA compliance review
items.description: Review SHA — info rights, reserved matters, drag/tag, anti-dilution triggers.

items.title: ESOP pool review
items.description: Track ESOPs granted vs. available pool, vesting schedules and exercises.

items.title: Valuation report (for primary / secondary)
items.description: Rule 11UA valuation for fresh issue or transfer — needed only for rounds.

items.title: FLA Return (FEMA)
items.description: Annual return on foreign liabilities & assets to RBI if any foreign investor exists.

items.title: FC-GPR filing (FEMA)
items.description: Report fresh share allotment to non-resident investor within 30 days.
